title: Background Investigation
description: Full background check including employment history, criminal records, and financial status.
text: Criminal records, employment & public records check.
recommendedText: Recommended for verifying subject history and identifying potential risk factors.

title: Background Investigation + Social Media
description: Full background investigation combined with deep social media analysis.
text: Full background plus deep social media review.
recommendedText: Recommended for comprehensive claimant profiling.
extraText: Combines offline and online intelligence for deeper insights.

title: Asset Check
description: Investigation of real property, vehicles, and financial assets held by the subject.
text: Real property, vehicles & financial assets held by subject.
recommendedText: Recommended when financial exposure or hidden assets are a concern.

title: NetSweep
description: Comprehensive social media and digital footprint analysis across all major platforms.
text: Comprehensive social & internet presence scan.
recommendedText: Recommended for uncovering online activity and digital footprint evidence.

title: Social Media Only
description: Targeted review of subject’s social media accounts and public online activity.
text: Targeted review of subject’s social accounts.
recommendedText: Recommended for quick validation of social activity without full investigation.

title: Claims Investigations
description: General investigation into claim validity and circumstances.
text: General review of circumstances and validity of a claim.
recommendedText: Recommended when claim details require verification or clarification.

title: Locate
description: Service to determine current address, phone number, or whereabouts of a subject.
text: Find current address, phone or whereabouts of a subject.
recommendedText: Recommended when subject location is unknown or outdated.

title: Report Procurement
description: Obtaining official reports such as police, fire, or incident records.
text: Obtain police, fire or other official incident reports.
recommendedText: Recommended when official documentation is required for case validation.

title: Activity Check
description: Covert observation to document claimant’s daily routine and activity.
text: Covert observation to document daily routine and activity.
recommendedText: Recommended for general observation of claimant lifestyle and behavior.

title: Activity Check – Field Surveillance
description: Covert field observation to document claimant’s physical activity and capabilities.
text: Covert observation to document daily routine and activity.
recommendedText: Recommended to verify self-reported physical limitations.
extraText: Highly effective for identifying activity inconsistencies.

title: Surveillance - 1 Investigator
description: Single investigator conducting covert surveillance operations.
text: Single investigator covert surveillance.
recommendedText: Recommended for standard surveillance cases with moderate complexity.

title: Surveillance - 2 Investigator
description: Two investigators conducting coordinated surveillance for complex cases.
text: Two-investigator surveillance for complex subjects.
recommendedText: Recommended for complex cases requiring continuous or multi-angle coverage.

title: Remote Controlled Surveillance (RCS)
description: GPS-assisted remote surveillance and tracking of subject activity.
text: GPS-assisted remote surveillance & tracking.
recommendedText: Recommended when continuous tracking is needed without physical presence.

title: True View Package
description: Combined package including background, remote, and traditional surveillance.
text: Background, remote and traditional surveillance combined.
recommendedText: Recommended for comprehensive investigations.
extraText: Maximizes visibility across all investigation channels.

title: Scene Investigation
description: On-site inspection and documentation of incident location.
text: On-site inspection and photo/video of the incident location.
recommendedText: Recommended when physical evidence or scene verification is required.

title: AOE/COE Investigation
description: Establishes whether the injury occurred during the scope of employment.
text: Determines if injury arose out of and in course of employment.
recommendedText: State-mandated for California WC claims.
extraText: Ordered in 94% of California WC claims at initial and active stages.

title: Medical Canvass with 15 locations
description: Canvass of 15 medical facilities to identify undisclosed treatment history.
text: Canvass 15 medical facilities for undisclosed treatment.
recommendedText: Recommended for identifying undisclosed medical treatment history.

title: Dependency Check
description: Verification of claim dependents and benefit eligibility.
text: Verifies claim dependents and benefit eligibility.
recommendedText: Recommended when validating dependent eligibility for benefits.

title: Alive and Wellness Check
description: Verification that claimant or beneficiary is alive and at reported location.
text: Confirms claimant or beneficiary is alive at reported location.
recommendedText: Recommended for periodic verification of claimant status.

title: Recorded Statement
description: Formal recorded interview with claimant to document their account on record.
text: Formal recorded interview with the claimant on the record.
recommendedText: Recommended for memorializing early claimant testimony.
extraText: Reduces likelihood of litigation by 82% when taken within 48 hours.

title: Document Delivery
description: Secure delivery of legal or investigative documents.
text: Secure hand-delivery of legal or investigative documents.
recommendedText: Recommended when secure and verifiable document delivery is required.

title: Subpoena
description: Service of legal subpoenas to individuals or organizations.
text: Service of legal subpoenas.
recommendedText: Recommended when legal compulsion is required to obtain information.

title: Subrogation
description: Identification of third-party liability to support cost recovery.
text: Identifies third-party liability to support cost recovery.
recommendedText: Recommended when potential third-party liability exists.

title: SIU
description: Special Investigations Unit referral for suspected fraud cases.
text: SIU referral for suspected fraud.
recommendedText: Recommended when fraud indicators are present in the claim.

title: SIU Compliance
description: Ensures investigations meet SIU regulatory compliance requirements.
text: Ensures investigation meets SIU regulatory requirements.
recommendedText: Recommended to ensure compliance with SIU regulations and standards.
